title: Fix #4864 of wrong runtime result
body:
Fix #4864 

EQ/NE under SHIFTR was wrongly target of the optimization.

EQ/NE under AND/OR tree such as `a[0] & (a[2:1] == 2'b10)` can be optimized to  `a[2:0] == 3'b101`.

But `(a[2:1] == 2'b10) >> 1` is not the case, but was wrongly shifted.

Push a test to reproduce the bug, then will push the fix later.


ext tests pass after manuallytweaking C++14 in the following line to be compatible with string literal.
https://github.com/ZipCPU/wbuart32/blob/d8ea86d1b8ef47d0b1c13f291a958b6aac9229f9/bench/cpp/Makefile#L74
